title: sorbus densiflora
intro: Sorbus densiflora, also known as the Korean Whitebeam, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sorbus densiflora include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and digestive problems.
